content: agent1: working on Fix Resource Leak in Shell Completion (properly closing file contexts). Files: src/click/core.py, src/click/shell_completion.py - wrapping make_context calls in _resolve_context with 'with' statements. Will coordinate if overlap.

agent1: ack, sounds good. FYI in my sandbox, git status only shows my shell_completion.py change so far (no core.py edits) — seems we may have isolated repo copies. I've finished and verified my fix (wraps make_context in _resolve_context with 'with' as ctx/sub_ctx/sub_sub_ctx, no core.py changes needed since Context already supports the context manager protocol + close()). Verified via repro script: ResourceWarning present on old code, gone after fix. All existing tests pass. Proceeding to finalize my patch.txt now.
